country.name: India
country.other_symbol: "I Bow to Thee, Mother" File:Vande Mataram on Mohan Veena.ogg
country.national_anthem: "Thou Art the Ruler of the Minds of All People" File:Jana Gana Mana instrumental.ogg
country.official_languages: Hindi, English, According to Part XVII of the Constitution of India, Hindi in the Devanagari script is the official language of the Union, along with English as an additional official language., sfn, National Informatics Centre, 2005, sfn, Ministry of Home Affairs 1960, States and union territories can have a different official language of their own other than Hindi or English. States and union territories can have a different official language of their own other than Hindi or English.
country.regional_languages: ]] Assamese, Bengali, Boro, Dogri, Gujarati, Hindi, Kannada, Kashmiri, Konkani, Maithili, Malayalam, Manipuri, Marathi, Nepali, Odia, Punjabi, Sanskrit, Santali, Sindhi, Tamil, Telugu, Urdu Kokborok, Lepcha, Mizo, Sikkimese, all the 8th scheduled languages – except Sindhi, Kashmiri and Dogri, Kashmiri and Dogri language are the official languages of Jammu and Kashmir which is currently a union territory and no longer the former state.
country.languages: 424 languages * Different sources give widely differing figures, primarily based on how the terms "language" and "dialect" are defined and grouped.
country.date_format: nowrap, abbr, dd, day, -, abbr, mm, month, -, abbr, yyyy, year, See Date and time notation in India. - -
country.religion: 79.8% Hinduism, 14.2% Islam, 2.3% Christianity, 1.7% Sikhism, 0.7% Buddhism, 0.4% Jainism, 0.23% unaffiliated, 0.65% other
